title: Option for a response in a form to automatically show as an update
excerpt:
We’re using the form feature as a ticketing system with the update feature being the form of communication. Would be awesome if the request could automatically populate in the update thread. 
Is this possible?

posts.author: michellesoiferNLI (Michelle Soifer)
posts.cookedHtml:
